notableEvents.label: Marcell Ozuna GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcell Ozuna grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Ryan O'Hearn out at 2nd. Marcell Ozuna out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: José Fermín pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: José Fermín singles on a ground ball to left fielder Bryan Reynolds.

notableEvents.label: Masyn Winn GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Masyn Winn grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Konnor Griffin to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. José Fermín out at 2nd. Masyn Winn out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: José Fermín pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: José Fermín doubles (2) on a line drive to left fielder Jake Mangum. Victor Scott II scores. Alec Burleson scores. Jordan Walker to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
